info.title: SCIM Open API
info.description: SCIM Validator which validates the JSON file against SCIM specification

tags.name: User
tags.description: Operations on user belonging to an organization

tags.name: Group
tags.description: Operations on group belonging to an organization

get.description: Queries multiple user identities in the organization domain. Filtering is available.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Without a filter, all user in a user domain are returned. The filter parameter must be a properly formed SCIM filter using either the operator eq (equals) or the operator sw (starts with).

400.description: Request is unparsable, syntactically incorrect, or violates schema.

401.description: Authorization failure.  The authorization header is invalid or missing.

403.description: Operation is not permitted based on the supplied authorization.

404.description: Not Found. Specified resource or endpoint does not exist.

post.description: Creates a new organization user and adds it to the user domain.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The details of the user to create

400.description: Request is unparsable, syntactically incorrect, or violates schema.

401.description: Authorization failure.  The authorization header is invalid or missing.

403.description: Operation is not permitted based on the supplied authorization.

404.description: Not Found. Specified resource or endpoint does not exist.

409.description: Conflict.The specified version number does not match the resource's latest version number, or a service provider refused to create a new, duplicate resource.

put.description: Updates an existing user. The request must include the full user definition. To modify one or more values without sending the full definition, see Update User

parameters.name: userKey
parameters.description: The key of the user to query. The user must be in the organization domain

get.description: Queries the identity of the current authenticated user.

401.description: Authorization failure.  The authorization header is invalid or missing.

403.description: Operation is not permitted based on the supplied authorization.

200.description: The current user has been replaced.

get.description: Queries service provider configurations. The service provider configurations are defined in SCIM Core Schema

400.description: Request is unparsable, syntactically incorrect, or violates schema.

displayName.description: The name of the User, suitable for display to end-users.  The name SHOULD be the full name of the User being described, if known.

externalId.description: An identifier for the resource as defined by the provisioning client.  Lilly Active Directory SID

active.description: A Boolean value indicating the User status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User typically used by the user to directly authenticate to the service provider. Each User MUST include a non-empty id value.  This identifier MUST be unique across the Service Consumer's entire set of Users.

userType.description: Used to identify the relationship between the organization and the user.

userName.description: User Principal Name (UPN), per Lilly Active Directory

displayName.description: The name of the User, suitable for display to end-users.  The name SHOULD be the full name of the User being described, if known.

externalId.description: An identifier for the resource as defined by the provisioning client.  Lilly Active Directory SID

active.description: A Boolean value indicating the User status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User typically used by the user to directly authenticate to the service provider. Each User MUST include a non-empty id value.  This identifier MUST be unique across the Service Consumer's entire set of Users.

userType.description: Used to identify the relationship between the organization and the user.

userName.description: User Principal Name (UPN), per Lilly Active Directory

type.description: A label indicating the attribute's function; will only be 'work'.

primary.description: A Boolean value indicating the 'primary'.  Will only be 'true'

emails.description: Email addresses for the user.  Only one address will be returned as that is all Azure AD supports.

roles.description: A list of roles for the User

items.description: The URI of the corresponding 'Group' resource to which the user belongs.

groups.description: A list of groups to which the user belongs

items.description: An HTTP addressable URL pointing to the service provider's human consumable help documentation.

ServiceProviderConfig.description: Schema for representing the service provider's configuration

supported.description: Boolean value specifying whether the operation is supported.

patch.description: A complex type that specifies PATCH configuration options.

supported.description: Boolean value specifying whether the operation is supported.

etag.description: A complex type that specifies ETAG configuration options.

maxPayloadSize.description: An integer value specifying the maximum payload size in bytes.

maxOperations.description: An integer value specifying the maximum number of operations.

supported.description: Boolean value specifying whether the operation is supported.

bulk.description: A complex type that specifies BULK configuration options.

maxResults.description: Integer value specifying the maximum number of resources returned in a response.

supported.description: Boolean value specifying whether the operation is supported.

filter.description: A complex type that specifies FILTER options.

supported.description: Boolean value specifying whether the operation is supported.

changePassword.description: A complex type that specifies change password options.

supported.description: Boolean value specifying whether the operation is supported.

sort.description: A complex type that specifies sort result options.

items.description: An HTTP addressable URL pointing to the Authentication Scheme's usage documentation.

name.description: The common authentication scheme name; e.g., HTTP Basic.

description.description: A description of the authentication scheme.

items.description: An HTTP addressable URL pointing to the Authentication Scheme's specification.

type.description: The authentication scheme.  This specification defines the values "oauth", "oauth2", "oauthbearertoken", "httpbasic", and "httpdigest".  REQUIRED.

authenticationSchemes.description: A complex type that specifies supported Authentication Scheme properties.

displayName.description: The name of the Group, suitable for display to end-users.
The name of the Group, suitable for display to end-users.

value.description: Identifier of the member of this Group.

items.description: The URI corresponding to a SCIM resource that is a member of this Group

members.description: A list of members of the Group.
